title: orchis × rosea
intro: Orchis × rosea, also known as the pink butterfly orchid, is a hybrid of the orchid plant family, resulting from the cross-pollination of two different orchid species. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Orchis × rosea include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory problems, improve cognitive function, and lower blood pressure. Herbal preparations of Orchis × rosea are typically made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
